title: BEM-946 push retry fix
objective:
Run script:
"""
def write_file(path, text):
    p=Path(path)
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(p))

write_file('governance/reports/BEM946_PUSH_REJECTED_DIAGNOSIS.md', '''# BEM-946 | Push rejected diagnosis
Status: PUSH_REJECTED_CONFIRMED
Date: 2026-05-31

Evidence from operator screenshot:
- Codex Runner job failed at push step.
- Error: rejected main -> main fetch first.
- Meaning: runner made local commit, but remote branch advanced before push.

Correction required:
- codex-runner push step must fetch latest main, rebase local commit and retry push.
- Prior BEM-932..945 file PASS claims must be treated as workflow/local artifacts until non-null commit SHA or remote verification exists.

No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/reports/BEM946_PUSH_RETRY_FIX_PLAN.md', '''# BEM-946 | Push retry fix plan
Status: FIX_PLAN_READY
Date: 2026-05-31

Required workflow behaviour:
1. Commit generated files.
2. Before push, run git fetch origin main.
3. Rebase local commit on origin/main.
4. Push.
5. If push rejected again, repeat fetch/rebase/push up to 3 attempts.
6. If still rejected, write explicit blocker with local commit SHA and do not claim remote PASS.

No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/state/remote_proof_policy.json', '''{
  "version": "1.0",
  "date": "2026-05-31",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "rules": [
    {"id":"local_commit_not_remote_pass", "severity":"critical", "rule":"A local runner commit SHA is not remote repo PASS unless push succeeded or remote verification confirms it."},
    {"id":"push_rejected_blocks_repo_claim", "severity":"critical", "rule":"If push is rejected, changed files must be reported as local/workflow artifacts, not repo artifacts."},
    {"id":"remote_pass_requires_sha", "severity":"critical", "rule":"Remote PASS requires non-null commit SHA that exists on origin/main or CI proof."},
    {"id":"retry_required_on_fetch_first", "severity":"high", "rule":"On fetch-first push rejection, runner must fetch, rebase and retry push."
    }
  ]
}
''')

write_file('governance/reports/BEM946_PUSH_RETRY_FIX_PASS.md', '''# BEM-946 | Push retry policy PASS
Status: PUSH_RETRY_POLICY_PASS
Date: 2026-05-31
Scope: Diagnosis and policy foundation for push conflict correction.
Created artifacts:
- governance/reports/BEM946_PUSH_REJECTED_DIAGNOSIS.md
- governance/reports/BEM946_PUSH_RETRY_FIX_PLAN.md
- governance/state/remote_proof_policy.json
Important:
- This task may still fail to push if current workflow is not yet patched.
- If push fails, this report is only local runner evidence, not remote PASS.
Next:
- Patch codex-runner.yml push step with fetch/rebase/retry.
- Re-run foundation rehydration after workflow patch lands.
No issue comments.
''')

ctx=Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
ctx.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
append='''\n\n## BEM-946 in progress | 2026-05-31\nOperator screenshot confirmed Codex Runner push rejection: remote main advanced and local runner push was rejected.\nCorrection: treat BEM-932..945 as local/workflow artifacts until remote proof exists. Create push rejected diagnosis, push retry plan and remote proof policy.\nNext: patch codex-runner.yml push step with fetch/rebase/retry and rehydrate foundation files after push fix.\nNo issue comments.\n'''
if ctx.exists():
    ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')+append, encoding='utf-8')
else:
    ctx.write_text('# AGENT_CONTEXT\n'+append, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(ctx))
ops_applied.append('BEM-946 push rejected diagnosis and remote proof policy created')
"""
No issue comments.
